name: @hypaware/claude-desktop
description: Claude Desktop adapter for HypAware. Desktop has no writable settings file, so this plugin renders the org-managed third-party-inference profile (stable gateway endpoint, manual model list, credential-helper reference) for MDM distribution instead of attach-on-join.

commands.name: claude-desktop profile
commands.summary: Render the managed 3P-inference profile for Claude Desktop

commands.name: claude-desktop install-helper
commands.summary: Write the no-arg credential wrapper the Desktop profile points at

commands.name: claude-desktop status
commands.summary: Show the resolved Desktop profile inputs (endpoint, mode, helper)

config_sections.summary: Desktop profile inputs: { models?, endpoint?, helper_path?, bundle_id? }. Rendered values only; the profile never carries a secret.
